story: Maha and Wania are two detectives on the run from Nabeeha and Emaan the police officers after finding a crucial piece of evidence

scenes.heading: On the Run
scenes.action: Maha and Wania are running down a dark alley

dialogue.speaker: Maha
dialogue.line: We need to get out of here, now!

dialogue.speaker: Wania
dialogue.line: I know, but where can we go?

scenes.visual_cues: Dark alley, Maha and Wania running

scenes.heading: Hiding in Plain Sight
scenes.action: Maha and Wania are hiding in a crowded market

dialogue.speaker: Maha
dialogue.line: Don't be so sure, Nabeeha and Emaan are not easy to shake off

scenes.visual_cues: Crowded market, Maha and Wania hiding behind a stall

scenes.heading: The Final Confrontation
scenes.action: Maha and Wania are cornered by Nabeeha and Emaan

dialogue.speaker: Nabeeha
dialogue.line: You're not taking anything else from us

dialogue.speaker: Maha
dialogue.line: We're just trying to uncover the truth

scenes.visual_cues: Abandoned warehouse, Maha and Wania cornered by Nabeeha and Emaan

characters.name: Emaan
characters.appearance: Emaan has a tall muscular build.
